name: studiomeyer-crm-hooks
description: Auto-lookup customer context on every prompt and auto-log email drafts as CRM interactions. Two mcp_tool hooks for the StudioMeyer CRM. Requires Claude Code v2.1.118 or later.

compliance.gdpr: Customer data flows from your Claude Code session to your own CRM tenant on crm.studiomeyer.io. No third-party sharing. Tenant-isolated. Delete anytime via the CRM dashboard.
compliance.notes: crm_log_interaction is not strictly idempotent at the protocol level — the tool_use_id parameter is the dedup key. Re-firing the hook on the same Edit will NOT duplicate the interaction record server-side.
